generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller, controlled by Jetson Orin Nano through ROS2 nodes."
]

instance SteeringServoActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Adjusts vehicle steering angle based on commands from Digital Twin Entity, controlled by Jetson Orin Nano via ROS2 nodes."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "3D environment mapping and object detection sensor using LiDAR technology."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera for visual perception and object tracking using Intel RealSense D435i technology."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated sensor measuring ego vehicle speed as part of lower-level chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated sensor measuring vehicle steering angle as part of lower-level chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iCamera
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance DBSCANClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point cloud clustering algorithm implemented in Physical Twin Entity for object detection from raw LiDAR data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter implementation for tracking object states (position, velocity) from clustered LiDAR data."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 Performance Class I compliant controlling algorithm for basic speed control without road curvature capabilities."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControllingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured timeseries data containing ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and motor/servo commands."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EgoVehicleStateData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks including size, position, and velocity information from DBSCAN and Kalman filter processing."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ProcessedObjectTracks
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataStorageEnabler, VisualizationEnabler, ControllingEnabler
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unprocessed LiDAR point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX sensor."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance CameraVisualData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw depth camera data from Intel RealSense D435i for visual perception."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CameraDepthData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingEnabler
]

instance DrivingPathProjection : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path visualization data generated from processed object tracks and vehicle state."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance DataPreProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based implementation of DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering in Physical Twin Entity for sensor data preprocessing."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataStorageEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database implementation for storing timeseries data of vehicle state and object tracks for external analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationService
]

instance ControllingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ISO 15622 compliant ACC control algorithm implemented in Digital Twin Entity for speed computation and command generation."
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "3D visualization implementation using Presentation Functional Entity for real-time monitoring of vehicle state and object tracks."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance UserInterfaceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Control Panel UI implementation enabling remote management of ACC system through User Entity."
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data serialization, unit conversion, and message alignment handler for cross-entity communication between PT and DTE."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for intra-system communication within Physical Twin Entity components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingEnabler, ControllingEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance WiFiNetworkCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wi-Fi network using UDP/TCP protocols for inter-entity communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationEnabler
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, DrivingPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloading of ACC system computation (lead vehicle detection and speed computation) from Physical Twin to Digital Twin Entity, returning only desired speed for actuation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCPerformanceInsight, ComputationalEfficiencyAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC, modification of desired speed, and emergency braking triggering through Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCControlAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of human-readable timeseries reports of object tracks and vehicle state for post-analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides PostAnalysisReportInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Storage of ego vehicle state and object tracks in SQL database for external analysis."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational insight into ego vehicle speed and steering angle trends."
]

instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational insight into detected objects' size, position, and velocity patterns."
]

instance DrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving path based on current vehicle state and object tracks."
]

instance ACCPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance metrics of ACC system including following distance and speed adjustments."
]

instance PostAnalysisReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable timeseries reports generated from stored data for post-drive analysis."
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Access to stored timeseries data of vehicle state and object tracks for external analysis."
]

instance ComputationalEfficiencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Reduction of computational burden on Jetson Orin Nano by offloading ACC computations to Digital Twin Entity."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC system and modification of desired speed through Control Panel UI."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggering of emergency braking through remote management interface."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C1: Digital Twin Entity
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:DigitalTwin [
    base:desc "Centralized Digital Twin Entity deployed externally (cloud/edge) hosting ACC computation, data storage, and remote management services."
    base:contains ControllingEnabler, DataStorageEnabler, DataTranslationEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

// C1: Physical Twin Entity
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom addition to ISO 23247 representing the vehicle's inherent resources (compute, sensors, actuators) deployed on Jetson Orin Nano."
    base:contains JetsonOrinNanoCompute, VedderElectronicSpeedController, TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelRealSenseD435iCamera, VehicleSpeedSensor, SteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuator, SteeringServoActuator, DataPreProcessingEnabler, ROS2Middleware
]

// C1: User Entity
instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized User Entity hosting 3D Visualization and Control Panel components for operator interaction."
    base:contains UserInterfaceEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

// C1: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale autonomous vehicle retrofitted for adaptive cruise control functionality."
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

// C1: Components
instance JetsonOrinNanoCompute : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Primary compute hardware running NVIDIA JetPack 5.0 SDK and ROS2 middleware for autonomy components."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor actuation controller converting desired speed commands to motor voltage commands."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance TraxxasSlash4x4Chassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Modified 1/10-scale vehicle chassis hosting lower-level (steering/speed control) and upper-level (autonomy hardware) components."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction includes:
    - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the DTE, sent back to the PT’s **Actuation FE** (via **Data Translation FE**) to adjust motor voltage.
    - **Remote management commands** (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) transmitted from the **User Entity (UE)** to the **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)** and then to the PT’s actuators.
    - **Actuation feedback**: The PT’s **Actuation FE** converts virtual commands into physical actions (motor/servo adjustments) using **ROS2 nodes** and **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** hardware."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at **real-time scales** with the following constraints:
    - **End-to-end latency**: ≤ **100 ms** (from PT to DTE) to support real-time ACC computation offloading, as per **3GPP TS 22.185** for V2V communication.
    - **Clock synchronization**: Devices must be synchronized to **±100 ms** accuracy to ensure event ordering and data integrity in distributed operations. This is a relaxed requirement due to hardware limitations but critical for safety-critical operations like emergency braking."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows an **entity-based architecture** inspired by **ISO 23247**, with the following orchestration:
    - **Physical Twin Entity (PTE)**: Hosts sensor data pre-processing (**Data Pre-Processing FE**), actuation (**Actuation FE**), and point cloud tracking (**DBSCAN + Kalman filter**).
    - **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Centralized on external hardware, hosting **Data Collecting FE**, **Controlling FE (ACC logic)**, **Reporting FE**, and **Presentation FE (visualization pre-processing)**.
    - **User Entity (UE)**: Centralized UI with **3D Visualization** and **Control Panel**, both mapped to the **User Interface FE**.
    - **Cross-System**: **Data Translation FE** handles inter-entity data serialization and unit conversion.
    The **Physical Twin Entity** is a custom addition to ISO 23247, reflecting the PT’s hardware-specific functionalities (e.g., sensor fusion, actuation). Communication between entities uses **ROS2 (internal)** and **Wi-Fi (external)**."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is primarily used during the **operation phase** of the vehicle’s lifecycle, supporting:
    - **Real-time monitoring and control** of the ACC system.
    - **Remote management** for development, testing, and operational adjustments.
    The DT also serves as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** during the **design phase**, leveraging **3D CAD-like visualizations** and simulators (e.g., **CREO Simulate** in related works) for validation. However, the case study focuses on the **as-operated** representation of the PT, not the **as-designed** or **as-manufactured** phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    - **Real-time data synchronization**: Achieved via **ROS2 middleware** and **Wi-Fi communication** with **≤100 ms latency**.
    - **Sensor fusion accuracy**: **DBSCAN** and **Kalman filter** for robust object tracking from LiDAR/camera data.
    - **ACC compliance**: Adherence to **ISO 15622** for performance class I ACC.
    - **Clock synchronization**: Devices synchronized to **±100 ms** to prevent event ordering errors.
    - **Validation mechanisms**: The system is tested for **real-world operability** (e.g., remote management, emergency braking) and **data integrity** (e.g., SQL storage for auditing).
    Uncertainty is mitigated by **hardware redundancy** (e.g., LiDAR + camera for object detection) and **real-time feedback loops** (e.g., actuation confirmation from PT)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
    - **Internal (PT)**: **ROS2 network** for communication between **Jetson Orin Nano**, sensors, and actuators.
    - **External (PT ↔ DTE)**: **Wi-Fi network** using **UDP/TCP protocols** (implied by ROS2 and Wi-Fi standards) with **≤100 ms end-to-end latency**.
    - **Data Translation**: The **Data Translation FE** serializes data, aligns message types, and performs **unit conversions** (e.g., motor voltage commands, sensor units) for cross-entity compatibility.
    The system does not specify **5G/V2X** or **dedicated short-range communication (DSRC)**, but the **3GPP TS 22.185** latency requirement suggests compatibility with future vehicular networks."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is hosted in a **distributed deployment**:
    - **Physical Twin Entity (PTE)**: Deployed on the **Jetson Orin Nano** within the PT.
    - **Digital Twin Entity (DTE)**: Deployed on **external hardware** (e.g., cloud/edge server) to offload computation.
    - **User Entity (UE)**: Deployed on **client devices** (e.g., laptops, tablets) for visualization and control.
    The **Data Storage** component uses an **SQL database** (external to the PT) for persistent storage. The **Physical Twin Entity** is a custom deployment layer not defined in ISO 23247, reflecting the PT’s hardware constraints."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
    - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for **Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework (Part 2)**, adapted for automotive use by mapping software components to **Functional Entities (FEs)**.
    - **ISO 15622**: Standard for **Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) performance requirements**, specifically **performance class I** (basic speed control).
    - **3GPP TS 22.185**: **Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication latency requirement** (≤100 ms end-to-end).
    - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for **robotics and autonomous systems**, ensuring modularity and interoperability.
    The system also implicitly follows **automotive safety standards** (e.g., **ISO 26262**) through **clock synchronization (±100 ms)** and **real-time constraints**, though these are not explicitly cited."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
    - **Real-time constraints**: The system enforces **≤100 ms latency** and **±100 ms clock synchronization** to prevent unsafe delays in critical operations (e.g., emergency braking).
    - **Remote operation safety**: The **Control Panel UI** allows remote management of ACC, including **emergency braking**, but requires **human oversight** (classified as **Fully Autonomous Digital Twin with Human-in-the-Loop**).
    - **Data integrity**: **ROS2 middleware** and **SQL storage** ensure structured, auditable data for post-incident analysis.
    - **Hardware limitations**: The **±100 ms clock synchronization** is a relaxed requirement due to hardware constraints but is sufficient for the **1/10-scale vehicle’s operational context**. For full-scale vehicles, stricter synchronization (e.g., **PTP/IEEE 1588**) would be required.
    - **No explicit cybersecurity measures**: The document does not detail **encryption**, **authentication**, or **access control** for remote operations, which are critical for **safety-critical automotive DTs**."
]
